message:
fix(core): widen raptorq source_blocks from u8 to u16

The ObjectTransmissionInformation constructor expects u16 for
source_blocks. Using u8 caused an unnecessary narrowing that could
silently truncate on future multi-block configurations. Widen to u16
in both production decode path and test mirror.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
